title: Multi-machine vault sync
description: No way to move a vault between machines without re-authenticating every account.

context.text: Source (verbatim from 2026-05-16 audit): Audit Priority: "Multi-machine vault sync (CRDT or simple last-write-wins)"

acceptanceCriteria: sweech sync configure picks a transport (iCloud Drive folder by default, S3/git remote optional)
Vault and config.json synced — secrets stay in keychain on each machine (never synced)
Conflict policy: last-write-wins with a .conflict-<ts>.json backup written if remote is newer
sweech sync status shows last sync, conflict count, remote
